title: Cerean (language)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the language of the alien species Cerean|the [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean species]]}}
{{Language
|image=
|name=Cerean
|users=[[Cerean/Legends|Cereans]]<ref name="FaD">[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]</ref>
|locations=[[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]<ref name="FaD" />

'''Cerean''' was the official spoken and written [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]].<ref name="u">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> It was mainly spoken by native [[Cerean/Legends|Cereans]].<ref name="u" /> Despite their isolationist stance,<ref name="ptr">''[[Star Wars: Prelude to Rebellion]]''</ref> the Cereans also learned to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], teaching it during childhood.<ref name="u" />

"[[Chu'unthor]]" was the Cerean word for "academy," and the word "[[Barsen'thor]]" translated to "Warden of the Order."

Many non-Cereans learned to speak the language, including [[Follnor Callat]],<ref name="g9">[[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]]</ref> [[Miltar Dolor]],<ref name="tf">''[[Tempest Feud]]''</ref> and [[Angela Krin]].<ref name="tf" /> Cerean was taught to many members of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], such as [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]],<ref name="cr">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]''</ref> [[Yarael Poof/Legends|Yarael Poof]],<ref name="poj">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]],<ref name="poj" /> and [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]<ref name="cr" /><ref name="poj" /><ref name="rcr">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]''</ref>.

{{Language-stub}}
